race.comment: SKYSTONE (7) started at $2.60 but was a shade disappointing on debut last time out over 1000m at Hawkesbury. Trialled since and may need this longer trip so worth another chance. I'M RELEVANT (6) was handy on the corner but raced greenly and dropped out on debut recently over 1100m in town. Better for that experience and deserves another chance. Debutante TOUCH OF CHARM (13) won a recent Scone trial in good style. In a strong yard and from the inside alley should get every chance. The Waller-trained ELSTEAD (9) lines up for the first time. Recent Rosehill trial winner who looks to have her share of ability.
